summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No merge candidate is safe because the hydrated artifact does not include complete merge preflight proof for any open PR. Three non-security PRs have concrete repair paths on maintainer-modifiable contributor branches. PR #80147 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation identified it as security-sensitive. PR #81696 is blocked on maintainer judgment because the latest ClawSweeper review explicitly requests maintainer review rather than code repair.

actions.reason: Repair the contributor branch rather than merge as-is. The branch is editable and focused, but review-bot findings remain unresolved.
Route the exact PR to central OpenClaw security handling. Do not repair, merge, comment on, or include this security-sensitive PR in the non-security fix artifact.
Repair should preserve useful update-phase tool frames while preventing duplicate progress-draft rendering. The current narrow implementation is not merge-ready.
Repair the contributor branch. The work is focused and editable, but unresolved ClawSweeper/Codex findings block merge.
Maintainer judgment is required before merge or repair because the current review state asks for human review rather than a concrete code-change blocker.

needs_human: #81696 requires maintainer review before merge or repair; hydrated ClawSweeper review says needs maintainer review and the author has requested maintainer attention.
